overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand gothic dining hall reminiscent of Hogwarts Great Hall, rendered in a game engine. Floating candles illuminate long dining tables occupied by students, with warm sunlight streaming through ornate stained glass windows at the far end. A single character in dark robes walks across the foreground midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air throughout the hall, providing warm illumination
large ornate stained glass window with colorful heraldic designs at the far end of the hall
tall stone pillars supporting the high vaulted ceiling along the left wall
tall stone pillars supporting the high vaulted ceiling along the right wall
long wooden dining tables lined with benches, occupied by diners eating and conversing
polished stone tile flooring reflecting the candlelight and sunlight

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent gothic great hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Sunlight streams through a large stained glass window at the far end, casting colorful light onto the stone floor. Students sit at long dining tables eating and conversing. Midway through, a character in dark robes walks across the foreground from right to left, briefly passing through the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand gothic dining hall where the interplay of candlelight and sunlight creates a timeless atmosphere. It begins with a wide view of the magnificent space, where thousands of floating candles cast a soft glow over students gathered at long dining tables. As the scene unfolds, the focus remains on the vibrant colors streaming through a large stained glass window at the far end, which illuminates the stone floor in shifting hues. The stillness is then momentarily interrupted as a character in dark robes walks across the foreground from right to left, passing through the frame before the view settles back into the ambient activity of the hall.
